svg.style: background-color: var(--bg-color, #1e1e2e); font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;

div.style: background: var(--bg-color, #1e1e2e); color: var(--text-color, #ffffff); height: 100%; padding: 30px; box-sizing: border-box; overflow-y: auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center;

input.style: flex:1; padding: 12px; font-size: 16px; background: #12121a; color: white; border: 1px solid #555; border-radius: 6px; outline: none;

div.style: background: var(--sidebar-bg, #2d2d44); color: var(--text-color, #ffffff); height: 100%; padding: 20px; box-sizing: border-box; overflow-y: auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
background: var(--editor-bg, #1e1e2e); color: var(--text-color, #ffffff); height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
background: #2a2a40; padding: 12px 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--primary-color, #ff6b6b); flex-wrap: wrap;
div.label: Fond :

input.style: cursor: pointer; width: 30px; height: 30px; border: 2px solid #fff; padding: 0; border-radius: 4px;

div.label: Titre :

input.style: cursor: pointer; width: 30px; height: 30px; border: 2px solid #fff; padding: 0; border-radius: 4px;

textarea.style: width: 50%; height: 100%; background: #12121a; color: #a9b7c6; border: none; padding: 20px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 14px; resize: none; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none;

div.style: width: 50%; height: 100%; padding: 20px; overflow-y: auto; background: var(--editor-bg, #1e1e2e); box-sizing: border-box;
background: var(--sidebar-bg, #2d2d44); color: var(--text-color, #ffffff); padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;

input.style: width: 100%; padding: 8px; background: #12121a; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #555; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; box-sizing: border-box;

div.p: Le Wiki se sauvegarde automatiquement. Exportez pour archiver.

button.style: flex:1; padding: 12px; background: #4caf50; border: none; color: white; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;
flex:1; padding: 12px; background: #2196f3; border: none; color: white; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;
width:100%;margin-top:20px;padding: 12px; background: #d32f2f; border: none; color: white; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;
